title: TrustForge Daemon Config
description: Configuration file for a running tf-daemon instance (.tf/daemon.yaml).

daemon_version.description: Version of the daemon-config schema itself.

self_actor.description: Actor URI the daemon presents during the session handshake.

listen.description: Transport bind settings for the daemon.

kind.description: Carrier kind. websocket: drive session over Bun.serve. tcp: drive session over raw Bun.listen. tls: drive session over raw Bun.listen with TLS termination.

bind.description: Bind host for the WebSocket listener.

port.description: Port for the WebSocket listener. 0 asks the OS to pick one.

path.description: Path to the passphrase-encrypted vault file.

contract_path.description: Path to the agent-contract YAML this daemon enforces.

proof_log_path.description: Path to the .tflog file the daemon appends to.

http.description: v1 local HTTP endpoint exposure. TCP listeners require bearer auth; Unix-domain sockets are local-decision sockets guarded by filesystem/group/peer trust.

tcp.description: TCP exposure for /v1/* endpoints. This surface is bearer-token protected.

port.description: TCP port for /v1/*; default 8642. 0 asks the OS to pick one.

auth.description: TCP /v1/* endpoints require the admin bearer token.

unix.description: Unix-domain socket exposure for local decision callers. /v1/decide uses local-peer trust; privileged routes stay bearer-gated.

enabled.description: When true, expose local decision endpoints over a Unix-domain socket.

path.description: Unix-domain socket path for local decision callers; production Linux default is /run/trustforge/decide.sock.

auth.description: Unix-socket /v1/decide and /v1/decide-batch trust filesystem/group/peer controls; privileged mutation endpoints still require bearer auth.

max_pending.description: Maximum pending approval requests before new ones are rejected.

default_timeout_seconds.description: How long to wait for an approval response before defaulting to deny.

profile.description: Conformance profile this daemon claims at startup. The runtime FeatureGate refuses to boot when the profile's MUST entries are not all satisfied.

enforcement_level.description: Default EnforcementLevel for the daemon's AgentGuard. See DECISIONS.md "Progressive enforcement".

admin.description: Local admin HTTP endpoint. Disabled when omitted.

enabled.description: When true, the daemon serves /admin/* HTTP routes alongside the WebSocket session listener.

token_env.description: Environment variable holding the bearer token for admin requests. Default TF_ADMIN_TOKEN.

revocation_path.description: Path of the JSON revocation list the admin endpoint appends to.

bind.description: Expected Host header and listener bind for admin routes. Defaults to 127.0.0.1.

max_body_bytes.description: Maximum accepted JSON body size for admin and v1 routes. Defaults to 65536.
